name: Thistle Tea
effect: Restore Health Equal to Rank. Randomly select a foe to inflict with a Status Condition chosen randomly between Burn, Paralysis, Frostbite and Badly Poisoned (remove any Status Conditions the foe already has or is unaffected by from selection). Cost's 1 Will to use.
description: With all this subtlety, you'll need to take a breather.
